description_long: This is a large, organized farm complex featuring multiple rectangular and L-shaped buildings, fenced paddocks, and open grassy areas. The structures include barns, stables, and utility sheds, with some buildings having pitched roofs and others flat or gently sloped. The grounds are divided by a network of pathways and driveways, with several fenced enclosures for livestock, visible as small white animal figures. Trees and shrubs are strategically placed around the property, providing shade and visual separation between zones. There is a parking area with a vehicle, and the overall layout is symmetrical and well-maintained, suggesting a modern, functional agricultural facility. The materials appear to be a mix of metal, wood, and concrete, typical for contemporary farm construction.
description: A modern, well-organized farm complex with multiple barns, fenced paddocks, and landscaped grounds. The layout includes various agricultural buildings, animal enclosures, and a parking area.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main barn, several fenced paddocks, and a large white-roofed building at the front, with animal enclosures and trees visible throughout.
description_view_1: From this angle, the layout of the paddocks and the arrangement of smaller outbuildings are more prominent, with the main barn and stables set further back.
description_view_2: This perspective shows the rear of the main barn, additional fenced areas, and a parking lot with a vehicle, emphasizing the farm's organized structure.
description_view_3: This view provides a clear look at the central pathways, the main barn, and the distribution of animal enclosures and smaller buildings across the property.
